title: Department Manager Vacancy at IKEA India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at IKEA India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!
